name: The Eagle Club
about: The Eagle Club is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Chester, New Jersey, designed to provide a premium golf experience regardless of weather conditions. The facility utilizes Foresight Sports technology, including the Falcon and GC Hawk simulators, offering access to famous courses in 4K and detailed performance tracking. It operates on a membership basis with options for annual and month-to-month plans, alongside a pay-per-hour model for non-members. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to serious players, and offers amenities such as a putting green, barstools, and a conference room for events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight Sports simulator technology with high accuracy
Access to famous courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews in 4K
Detailed performance tracking (ball speed, club speed, swing path) for game improvement
Flexible membership options and pay-per-hour availability
On-site amenities including a putting green and food/drink options

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can bring their own food; no food allowed on the putting green or simulator area
No alcohol mentioned as available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Leading simulator technology with object-tracking capabilities
Used for range sessions and games, offers numerous famous courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs, but you must use the golf balls provided in the simulator to protect the screen.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks; there is a fridge available to keep drinks cold. No food is allowed on the putting green or simulator area.

faq.question: How much time should I book for a full round of 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full round (18 holes) generally takes 1 hour per person. For four people playing 18 holes, a 4-hour time slot is recommended.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, guests under 21 are allowed as long as they are accompanied by an adult member, and guests 16 years or older are permitted.
